32A Okains Bay Road, Robinsons Bay

Robinsons Bay, Banks Peninsula

NZD $950,000

Open homes

Sunday

8:30am - 9:30am

08 Feb

Property details

Tucked into the heart of Robinsons Bay and featuring breathtaking views over the Peninsula, this 2000s-built, builder's own home delivers the kind of solid, practical bach that's made for generations to cherish.

Set on a 782m² freehold section, the main home offers three bedrooms and a family bathroom with a separate bath and shower, while the accommodation is cleverly extended by a carpeted double garage with a substantial, connected and private oversized bedroom with its own kitchenette and ensuite.

Character and comfort are front and center, with exposed Rimu framing throughout, full double glazing, and a living space that truly impresses.

Cathedral ceilings are met with breathtaking bay views and a log burner combines with a heat pump for effortless year-round comfort.

Multiple sliders open from the living area to several outdoor decks, creating natural indoor-outdoor flow and giving you options to chase the sun, entertain, or simply sit back and take in the outlook.

The spacious, family-friendly kitchen sits at the heart of the home, offering plenty of bench space, great storage and a warm, social layout - imagine cooking, chatting and making family meals come to life all whilst enjoying the bay as your backdrop.

Low-maintenance grounds mean more time exploring and less time maintaining, with a garden shed, off-street parking and space for all the bach toys.

Just minutes from French Farm Winery, a short drive into Akaroa, and surrounded by bays, beaches and walking tracks, this is a genuine family bach - warm, well-built and perfectly positioned for years of memories still to come.

Please be aware that this information may have been sourced from REINZ/Property Smarts/Land Information New Zealand/the relevant local authority/CERA and we have not been able to verify the accuracy of the same.

  • ✓Minutes to French Farm Winery and Akaroa

Additional features

  • ✓4 other parks
  • ✓2 Separate toilets
  • ✓Rates: $4,761.74 per annum
